title: Work loading widget having a "Max" function
excerpt:

posts.author: THEzenonPARADOX (Matthew Cox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m building a planner for lab work planner and one of the features that need to be measured is the maximum weight of the loads that are being placed on technicians per day

A similar function in excel would be the MAX([Field]) function or more specifically the maximum number in a field occurring on a specific day for a single person

MAXIFS([Range], [Date Range], [DayX], [Person Range], [TechX])

this feature I feel would have great benefits for all types of workloads for projects/work with manual handling elements.
